text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 229 

RFRG_PRVDR_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Referring Provider Type Code 

DESCRIPTION: A code describing the type of provider (i.e. doctor) who referred the patient. 

SHORT NAME: RFRG_PRVDR_TYPE_CD 

LONG NAME: RFRG_PRVDR_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 

VALUES: 01 = Physician 
02 = Speech Language
